creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-08-06 15:34:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Config-JSON Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This package parses the config files written in JSON. It also does some
  non-JSON stuff, like allowing for comments in the files.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Config-JSON/
  
  PR:             ports/126119
  Submitted by:   Tomoyuki Sakurai <cherry at trombik.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3165    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/devel/p5-Config-JSON/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-JSON/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-JSON/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-JSON/pkg-plist (new)
